originalTitle: MSCI flags investability concerns in Indonesia over transparency
summary: Global index provider has warned it could downgrade south-east Asian country to a ‘frontier market’
content: Global index provider has warned it could downgrade south-east Asian country to a ‘frontier market’

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
